message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
actor "User" as user1
circle "server" as server
database "user" as user2

activate user1
activate server

user1 -> server: 1 POST /sign-up with body: email and password
activate user2
server -> user2: 2 Check email existence
alt Email existed
    user2 -->> server: 3 Error code
    server -->> user1: 4 Error message
else Email is new
    user2 -->> server: 5 Email is available
    server -> server: 6 Hash password
    server -> user2: 7 Store email and hashed password
    user2 -->> server: 8 Store complete
    server -->> user1: 9 Success message
end

deactivate user2
deactivate server
deactivate user1

@enduml
```
